title: Repair API release identity PR #1404 against current deployment contracts
goal: Update PR #1404 on current main so API release identity remains source-commit-bound without weakening the deployment drift guard or the VPS proxy/Caddy safety contract.

acceptance.assertion: PR #1404 is updated or rebuilt on the then-current main without overwriting unrelated work.
acceptance.verifier: GitHub head/base and git ancestry receipt

acceptance.assertion: Infra changes are paired with an explicit deploy snapshot or deployment documentation acknowledgement accepted by Deploy Drift Guard.
The VPS deploy entrypoint preserves the required Caddy/static-web safety condition and the proxy trust preflight passes.
All required CI, API, CodeQL and Web E2E checks pass on the exact final head.
acceptance.verifier: GitHub statusCheckRollup bound to final head

acceptance.assertion: A full final GitHub diff and SHA-256-bound self-review are recorded before merge.

observed_failures: Deploy Drift Guard rejects infra/compose/compose.prod.yml change without deploy snapshot or docs acknowledgement.
Proxy trust preflight rejects removal of the DEPLOY_TARGET=vps and WITH_CADDY=0 safety condition from scripts/weltgewebe-up.
